productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ezeiro III Black Sports Shoes
description: Your agile striker needs fast cleats. These adidas Ezeiro 3 TRX FG soccer cleats have a durable-yet-lightweight synthetic upper and the unbeatable TRAXION FG outsole that will put you a step ahead of everyone else.UpperSynthetic leather upper for light weight and durabilitySoft textile lining for additional comfortSynthetic leather overlays with high-visibility white adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides for enhanced shoe structureMeshed and padded collar for breathable comfortAsymmetrical lacing system for a snug, customised FitMidsoleDie-cut EVA midsole for cushioningOutsoleTPU plate outsole for lightweight performance and durabilityTRAXION FG outsole for grip and comfort on firm natural surfacesShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
